zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah S Reightley於1879年出生在美國愛阿華州時，她的父親John Wilson Reightley35歲，母親Bridget Ann Nugent27歲。她於1900年11月30日與Monte Lyman Cunningham在美國明尼蘇達州賀伯特帕克 拉皮茲結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她於1885年住在美國明尼蘇達州賀伯特賀伯特 堂史普且在美國明尼蘇達州賀伯特可洛 文 蕾克 堂史普住了大約30年。她去世於1942年11月30日在美國明尼蘇達州賀伯特阿可勒享年63歲，埋葬在美國明尼蘇達州賀伯特阿可勒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah S Reightley于1879年出生在美国艾奥瓦州时，她的父亲John Wilson Reightley35岁，母亲Bridget Ann Nugent27岁。她于1900年11月30日与Monte Lyman Cunningham在美国明尼苏达州賀伯特帕克 拉皮茲结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她于1885年住在美国明尼苏达州賀伯特賀伯特 堂史普且在美国明尼苏达州賀伯特可洛 文 蕾克 堂史普住了大约30年。她去世于1942年11月30日在美国明尼苏达州賀伯特阿可勒享年63岁，埋葬在美国明尼苏达州賀伯特阿可勒。

nameMeanings.name: Reightley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gatlaoich, see Gately .

variants.name: Keighley
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so named in Yorkshire. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Cyhha + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of German Kiechle (see Kuechle ) or Kiechler (see Kuechler ).

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.title: The Assassination of James Garfield
historicEvents.description: Garfield was shot twice by Charles J. Guitea at Railroad Station in Washington, D.C. on July 2, 1881. After eleven weeks of intensive and other care Garfield died in Elberon, New Jersey, the second of four presidents to be assassinated, following Abraham Lincoln.
Historical Boundaries: 1887: Cass, Minnesota, United States 1895: Hubbard, Minnesota, United States

historicEvents.title: Plessy vs. Ferguson
historicEvents.description: A landmark decision of the U.S. Supreme Court upholding the constitutionality of racial segregation laws for public facilities if the segregated facilities were equal in quality. It's widely regarded as one of the worst decisions in U.S. Supreme Court history.

historicEvents.title: The Kensington Runestone
historicEvents.description: A Swedish man, Olof Ohman, was farming on his land when he came across a 202-pound rock slab that had strange writing on it. Convinced it was proof that Scandinavian explorers came to that area before Columbus found the Americas, he had it looked at by scholars and linguists to find its translation. There has been a drawn-out debate on the stone's authenticity, with a scholarly consensus that classifies it as a hoax and the community which is convinced that it is authentic.

historicEvents.title: The Girl Scouts
historicEvents.description: Like the Boy Scouts of America, The Girl Scouts is a youth organization for girls in the United States. Its purpose is to prepare girls to empower themselves and by acquiring practical skills.

historicEvents.title: The Completion of the Keokuk Dam
historicEvents.description: The Keokuk Dam was completed in 1913 and began to power the surrounding area. It was the largest single capacity powerhouse in the world at the time. After World War II, the powerhouse was modernized and all the units were converted in 2002. It remains the largest privately owned and operated dam on the Mississippi River.
13 million people become unemployed after the Wall Street stock market crash of 1929 triggers what becomes known as the Great Depression. President Herbert Hoover rejects direct federal relief.

historicEvents.title: The Prehistoric Minnesota Woman
historicEvents.description: The Minnesota Woman was the name given to the skeletal remains of a woman thought to be 8,000 years old found near Pelican Rapids. The bones were brought to the University of Minnesota for more study. Later, Dr. Albert Jenks identified them as the bones of a 15 or 16 year old woman. Scientists now recognize the girl as someone whose ancestors were Paleo-Indian and now her skeletal remains have been reburied in South Dakota, not available for further study.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah S Reightley was born in 1879, in Iowa, United States, her father, John Wilson Reightley, was 35 and her mother, Bridget Ann Nugent, was 27. She married Monte Lyman Cunningham on 30 November 1900, in Park Rapids, Hubbard, Minnesota, United States. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She lived in Hubbard Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, United States in 1885 and Crow Wing Lake Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, United States for about 30 years. She died on 30 November 1942, in Akeley, Hubbard, Minnesota, United States, at the age of 63, and was buried in Akeley, Hubbard, Minnesota, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah S Reightley est née en 1879, à Iowa, États-Unis, son père, John Wilson Reightley, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Bridget Ann Nugent, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Monte Lyman Cunningham le 30 novembre 1900, à Park Rapids, Hubbard, Minnesota, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle a vécu à Hubbard Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, États-Unis en 1885 et à Crow Wing Lake Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, États-Unis pendant environ 30 ans. Elle est décédée le 30 novembre 1942, à Akeley, Hubbard, Minnesota, États-Unis, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Akeley, Hubbard, Minnesota, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah S Reightley 1879 in Iowa, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Wilson Reightley 35 und ihre Mutter Bridget Ann Nugent 27. Sie hat am 30. November 1900 in Park Rapids, Hubbard, Minnesota, Vereinigte Staaten Monte Lyman Cunningham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1885 hat sie in Hubbard Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt, und ungefähr 30 Jahre lang hat sie in Crow Wing Lake Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Sie starb am 30. November 1942 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Akeley, Hubbard, Minnesota, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Akeley, Hubbard, Minnesota, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah S Reightley è nata il nel 1879 nel Iowa, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, John Wilson Reightley, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Bridget Ann Nugent, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Monte Lyman Cunningham il 30 novembre 1900, nel Park Rapids, Hubbard, Minnesota, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Vissuto a Hubbard Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1885 e nel Crow Wing Lake Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, Stati Uniti d'America per circa 30 anni. Morì il 30 novembre 1942, nel Akeley, Hubbard, Minnesota, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Akeley, Hubbard, Minnesota, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah S Reightleyが1879年にアメリカ合衆国アイオワ州で生まれた時，父John Wilson Reightleyは35歳，母Bridget Ann Nugentは27歳であった。1900年11月30日にアメリカ合衆国ミネソタ州ハバードパーク ラピズでMonte Lyman Cunninghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1885年にはアメリカ合衆国ミネソタ州ハバードハバード トウンシュイップに，アメリカ合衆国ミネソタ州ハバードクロー ウィング ラク トウンシュイップに約30年間住んでいた。彼女は1942年11月30日にアメリカ合衆国ミネソタ州ハバードアケリーで63歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ミネソタ州ハバードアケリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah S Reightley(이)가 1879년 미국 아이오와 주에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Wilson Reightley(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bridget Ann Nugent(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1900년 11월 30일 미국 미네소타 주 후브바드 박 라피드즈에서 Monte Lyman Cunningham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1885년도에 미국 미네소타 주 후브바드 후브바드 타운시프에서, 미국 미네소타 주 후브바드 크로 윙 레이크 타운시프에서 약 30년 동안 살았다. 그녀는 1942년 11월 30일 미국 미네소타 주 후브바드 악리에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 미네소타 주 후브바드 악리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah S Reightley nasceu em 1879, em Iowa, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, John Wilson Reightley, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Bridget Ann Nugent, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Monte Lyman Cunningham em 30 de novembro de 1900, em Park Rapids, Hubbard, Minesota, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela viveu em Hubbard Township, Hubbard, Minesota, Estados Unidos da América em 1885 e em Crow Wing Lake Township, Hubbard, Minesota, Estados Unidos da América por quase 30 anos. Ela faleceu em 30 de novembro de 1942, em Akeley, Hubbard, Minesota, Estados Unidos da América, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Akeley, Hubbard, Minesota, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah S Reightley родилась в 1879 г. в местности Айова, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени John Wilson Reightley было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Bridget Ann Nugent, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Monte Lyman Cunningham 30 ноября 1900 г. в местности парк рапидс, хуббард, Миннесота, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она жила в местности хуббард тоуншип, хуббард, Миннесота, Соединенные штаты в 1885 году и в местности кроу виг леик тоуншип, хуббард, Миннесота, Соединенные штаты около 30 лет. Она умерла 30 ноября 1942 г. в местности акели, хуббард, Миннесота, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности акели, хуббард, Миннесота, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah S Reightley nació en 1879, en Iowa, Estados Unidos, su papá, John Wilson Reightley, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Bridget Ann Nugent, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Monte Lyman Cunningham el 30 de noviembre de 1900, en Park Rapids, Hubbard, Minnesota, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Vivió en Hubbard Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, Estados Unidos en 1885 y en Crow Wing Lake Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, Estados Unidos durante unos 30 años. Murió el 30 de noviembre de 1942, en Akeley, Hubbard, Minnesota, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Akeley, Hubbard, Minnesota, Estados Unidos.
